message:
refactor: Convert module handlers to comptime pattern

Convert 15 more *_mod.zig files from runtime genConst helper
pattern to comptime function generator pattern, reducing total
lines from 10,032 to 9,953 (79 lines saved).

Files: _bz2, _compression, _csv, _ctypes, _curses_panel, _collections,
_contextvars, _curses, _dbm, _decimal, array, trace, profile, pdb, calendar
